text: The industry is indispensable to our economy. There are plenty of opportunities within the industry, but it is important to continue to innovate and appeal to young generations of technical talent. Modderkolk from Wijchen (Gelderland) has been succeeding in this with flying colors since 1921. What does that mean for the specialist in industrial automation and installation technology? A modern image and a good influx of Generation Z - of the 250 employees, more than a quarter were born after 1996.

text:
Read the complete report here '[What practically educated Gen Zers really want](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/industrie/wat-praktisch-opgeleide-gen-zers-echt-willen.html)'
Ready for the future, for over a century. “[Modderkolk](https://www.modderkolk.nl/) was founded by my grandfather in 1921. My parents took over at some point, and I have now been at the helm for about forty years,” Simon begins. To remain successful for so long, it is very important to completely change course periodically. 'We did that in 2007, for example. I then set four clear goals: continue to flourish forever, put customers first, fully commit to the development of our people and ensure a high level of motivation.

metadata.source_title: Modderkolk: Offer Gen Zers perspective, otherwise you will lose them

text:
My parents took over at some point, and I have now been at the helm for about forty years,” Simon begins. To remain successful for so long, it is very important to completely change course periodically. 'We did that in 2007, for example. I then set four clear goals: continue to flourish forever, put customers first, fully commit to the development of our people and ensure a high level of motivation. We are still reaping the benefits of that change, even when it comes to attracting and retaining new talent.'
Learning and development as the key to success. 2012 was a crucial year on the way to the development goal.

Learning and development as the key to success. 2012 was a crucial year on the way to the development goal. Then the company – together with the Koning Willem I College in Den Bosch – set up its own education department.

text:
I then set four clear goals: continue to flourish forever, put customers first, fully commit to the development of our people and ensure a high level of motivation. We are still reaping the benefits of that change, even when it comes to attracting and retaining new talent.'
Learning and development as the key to success. 2012 was a crucial year on the way to the development goal. Then the company – together with the Koning Willem I College in Den Bosch – set up its own education department. Under the name Modderkolk Academy, they bundle all training, education and courses - including a business school. 'What we mainly wanted to achieve with our Academy was to attract and retain more people in technology - for our company, but also out of love for the profession.' According to Simon, finding people is not that difficult, nor is finding suitable work for them.

text:
Owner Modderkolk
Commitment to the cause. To boost motivation, Simon focused on three sub-goals. 'Firstly, the purpose of the organization must be aligned with that of our people. Secondly, people should be able to organize their work themselves as much as possible. And finally, mastery is very important: they must be able to become the best at something.

metadata.source_title: Modderkolk: Offer Gen Zers perspective, otherwise you will lose them

text: To boost motivation, Simon focused on three sub-goals. 'Firstly, the purpose of the organization must be aligned with that of our people. Secondly, people should be able to organize their work themselves as much as possible. And finally, mastery is very important: they must be able to become the best at something. If you can offer them that perspective, there is a good chance that your people will feel involved in and committed to the company.

Owner Modderkolk
Generation Z demands customization. Knowing what the youngest generation needs is one thing. It is much more important for an employer to respond adequately to this. metadata.source_title: Modderkolk: Offer Gen Zers perspective, otherwise you will lose them

text: Knowing what the youngest generation needs is one thing. It is much more important for an employer to respond adequately to this. 'With us, students immediately become a full part of the team - including salary and autonomy. Because they find their work-life balance important, they can work flexibly and we schedule them close to home where possible. Moreover, they can determine their desired specialization very efficiently during speed dates with project leaders.' text:
Organize social activities to stimulate bonding within teams. Read more in the construction sector. The Dutch construction sector has been one of the best performing sectors in recent years, despite several challenges facing the sector. Examples are the nitrogen dossier, the significant price increases for energy and building materials and also the personnel shortages. Driven by trends, innovations and legislation and regulations, the relevance of themes such as sustainability and environmental impact is growing and the sector is looking for a new balance.
